## Checklist

- [ ] I used an accessible primary source.
- [ ] I confirmed the title, date, version, engine/runtime, and task.
- [ ] The description is concise, neutral, and supported by the source.
- [ ] I used no more than three useful labels.
- [ ] I added a boundary where readers could overgeneralize the evidence.
- [ ] I opened every new or changed link.
- [ ] I checked for duplicates and used an existing category.
- [ ] I updated `UPDATES.md` if this materially changes the landscape.
